items.text:
What an electric night! SlayRoyale was incredibly proud to provide production support for Chelsea and Westminster Hospital NHS Foundation Trust’s groundbreaking "Scrubs to Sequins" event. 🏥✨

Seeing a hospital cafeteria transition into a high-octane runway venue was an ultimate shift in what happens when healthcare finally meets high fashion. This project wasn't just about the clothes, it was a vital initiative for staff wellbeing and fundraising for CW+, proving that our NHS heroes shine just as bright under the spotlights as they do under the ward lights.

📢 Calling all healthcare organisations!
If you are looking for a unique way to boost staff morale, celebrate your workforce, and fundraise for your dedicated charity and you don't know where to start?

SlayRoyale is ready to help you bring your vision to life. From casting and rehearsals to full-scale event production, let’s collaborate to create your own "front row" moment.

DM us to discuss how we can support your next Health and Wellbeing project!

👑 THE OFFICIAL CREDITS 👑

The Visionary & Lead:

💙 Anette Namwen (A&E Nurse & SlayRoyale Creative)

Trust Leadership & Advocacy:

💙 Lesley Watts (Chief Executive)
💙 Emer (Director of Communications)
💙 Rhian & Chloe (CW+ Fundraising team)
💙 Chelsea and Westminister NHS Trust Management, Health & Wellbeing Team, and A&E Matrons/Leads

The Featured Designers

💙 Lj Jhay of @dds_ldn
💙 Angeli Jackson of SunSibility
💙 Abigael of LuluDoll London
💙 Jean-Marc Sustainability of @Totes4Us
💙 Venera of Venny IB Collection
💙 Jairus Sumineg of Independent

Production & Logistics (SlayRoyale & Partners):
💙 SlayRoyale Crew

Venue & Post-Event Turnaround
💙 ISS (Margareth & Team) and the AVR Team

HMUA
💙 Carlcen Japsay 

Visuals (Photo/Video)
💙 Sidh, Jikson, George, and Lilley

To the Staff Models who owned the runway and the sponsors who made it all possible—congratulations on a collective triumph! 🥂❤️

#scrubstosequins #slayroyale #NHSWellbeing #ChelseaAndWestminster #CWPlus #HealthcareHeroes #NHSEvents #StaffMorale #RunwayProduction

items.text:
**Serwis to dopiero początek! 🛠️🎥**

W **BEIKS Serwis** dbamy o to, aby Twój sprzęt zawsze działał bez zarzutu. Ale czy wiedziałeś, że nasza wiedza techniczna wykracza daleko poza naprawę podzespołów?

Projektujemy i wdrażamy profesjonalne rozwiązania dla Twojego biznesu i studia! Nasza oferta obejmuje:
* **Montaż systemów oświetleniowych** – od prostych setupów po zaawansowane systemy studyjne.
* **Instalację systemów kamer** – konfigurujemy profesjonalne tory kamerowe i systemy monitoringu.
* **Wsparcie techniczne** – doradzamy, jak optymalnie rozmieścić sprzęt, by uzyskać najlepszy efekt.

Skoro wiemy, jak naprawić każdą usterkę, to najlepiej wiemy też, jak poprawnie zamontować Twój sprzęt, by służył latami! 🚀

PRZEŻYJ PRZYGODĘ NA PLANIE ZDJĘCIOWYM! 

Szukamy statystów i epizodystów do nowego, współczesnego serialu!

items.text:
⭐️Casting do shorta – rola kobieca⭐️
Poszukujemy kobiety w wieku ok. 50–55 lat do roli kobiecej – córki Polaka, urodzonej i wychowanej w USA.
💥Wymagania:
👉płynna znajomość języka angielskiego (mile widziany amerykański akcent),
👉zadbany wygląd,
👉naturalna prezencja przed kamerą.

💜Szczegóły produkcji:
termin zdjęć: 2 dni w okresie 14–17 maja,
lokalizacja: okolice Warszawy,
wynagrodzenie: 450 zł / dzień.

Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o zgłoszenia wraz ze zdjęciem portretowym, sylwetki oraz krótkim nagraniem w języku angielskim 💫 // Standardowo poproszę o kompletne zgłoszenia zawierające również imię, nazwisko, wiek, numer kontaktowy, wzrost ☺️☺️

💌michalina@Unagimedia.pl
Tytuł: AMERYKANKA 

Pozdrawiam serdecznie !🦋

items.text:
Do majowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję aktorki do roli:

Marika Borowska (37) – żona ofiary, zadbana, klasa średnia, emocjonalnie rozchwiana, od załamania po zimną determinację. Powinna mieć „zwyczajną” urodę, żeby była wiarygodna jako ofiara i sprawczyni. Uwaga: dobrze gra – płacze, próbuje uwodzić, przekonująco kłamie. AKTORKA

Data: 07. maja
Stawka: 700 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
CASTING CALL – INDEPENDENT SHORT FILM "NOAH"
Synopsis: Noah, a 13-year-old boy from Western Sydney, lives in a broken home with an alcoholic, abusive father and a mother in prison. He tries to escape his family by seeking belonging with his two friends – even though he knows they don't truly care. When his father is taken away by police, Noah finds himself completely unsupervised. He drifts toward a reckless street gang, starts buying vapes, and loses his innocence for good.

Shooting Location: Sydney / Western Sydney

Shooting Dates: 4 days within the first week of May (exact dates TBC, to be arranged with cast availability)

LOOKING FOR:

1.THOMAS (Supporting)Male 12–16

Role: Noah's other friend. He talks behind Noah's back and makes mean comments about his family. Not evil – just casually cruel and unaware of the damage he causes.

2. TOBY (Small role)Male40+

Role: A customer in a tobacco shop. He catches Noah trying to steal a vape and confronts him briefly. Only one scene.

3. FATHER (Likely voice-only role)40+

Voice requirement: Rough, gruff, powerful

4. Few boys aged 14–16; no acting experience required, and there are no lines.

What we offer:

Low‑budget student / independent film

Copy, credit, and meals on set

It will be submitted to major international film festivals

All minors must have parental/guardian consent and supervision on set

How to apply:

Send the following to jili3742@uni.sydney.edu.au

Recent photo (headshot or full body)

Age and location

Showreel

For FATHER role: Please send a voice note (or short video) of you yelling 1–2 lines (e.g., “Where are you?!”, “You worthless piece of –”) to show your vocal range.

Deadline: 01/05/2026

Shooting dates: 4 days within the first week of May (exact dates to be confirmed)

Ideal candidates:

This is a great opportunity to build your portfolio, gain exposure, and be part of high-performing viral campaigns.

Interested? Get in touch with your portfolio/showreel and availability.

items.text:
Can you play a woman who swallowed a lifetime of fury — and finally, deliberately, chose where to aim it?

https://tinyurl.com/DraculaAudition
Audition registration is open until 17 May
Auditions 30/31 May by appointment.

The UK Amateur Premiere of Kate Hamill's Dracula, Halloween 2026

All crew/cast are unpaid roles
Rehearsals in Rochdale, Littleborough from August

sharedPost.text:
Mina

She is the most competent person in every room she enters.
The men don't notice.
She makes sure of it.

Intelligent. Loyal. Practical.
Brave in a way nobody has ever been asked to see.
Pregnant — and that is not a limitation.
It never was.

She knows every rule.
She follows every one.
Not because she has to.
Because she is waiting.
She wants to run wild.
She wants to fight.
She wants to be more than they will ever let her be.

She will be.

She was raised to be a Lady.
She is also the one who ends it.

This role is the spine of the production.
It demands emotional range, physical stamina, stage combat, and sincerity that never breaks.

Can you play a woman who swallowed a lifetime of fury — and finally, deliberately, chose where to aim it?"

Auditions 30/31 May

Register now.
🔗 https://tinyurl.com/DraculaAudition

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula2026 #FeministTheatre #Mina #CharacterBreakdown

media.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'She carried everything. The child. The doubt. The fury. The weight of being endl endlessly reasonable. Until she couldn' t. Until she could. Mina Every story ends. Not always in the way you were told.'

items.text:
MAY WORKSHOP – LIMITED PLACES 

DEVISING: CHARACTER → STORY → PERFORMANCE

Saturday 9th May | 2–5pm
The Crescent Theatre, Birmingham

This isn’t just about “coming up with ideas” — it’s about bringing characters to life and getting them on their feet.

In this practical, high-energy session, we’ll:
• Build bold, instinctive characters through improvisation
• Explore relationships, dynamics, and playable choices
• Turn raw ideas into scenes that actually work on stage
• Discover story through action — not overthinking
• Work as an ensemble to create something spontaneous, surprising, and performable

Come with a character, a line, or absolutely nothing — we’ll create everything from scratch in the room.

This is about doing, playing, and taking risks — not sitting around talking about ideas.

Perfect for actors who want to stretch themselves, trust their instincts, and create original work

£38 | Places are limited

 Message or email to book: estherstanford@icloud.com

www.estherstanford.co.uk

#actingworkshop #birminghamactors #devising #actortraining #actingclass

items.text:
Actors… your Spotlight profile isn’t “done” just because it exists.

It’s either working for you… or it’s silently losing you opportunities every single day.

Fix it. Sharpen it. Make it undeniable.

If you’re serious about getting seen, start acting like a professional.

👉 linktr.ee/mattzina

#actorslife #spotlightactor #actingcareer #selftape #castingdirector

sharedPost.text:
🎬 SODIES KASI TV: THE "FOUNDING 40" RECRUITMENT 🎬

Meadowlands, it’s time to tell our own stories. We are building a media empire from the ground up, and we are looking for the hungry, the disciplined, and the visionaries to join us.

THE REALITY CHECK: We are a 100% grassroots startup. We are starting from scratch with:
❌ NO Tools/Equipment (We use our smartphones)
❌ NO Budget/Salary (We work for credits, experience, and growth)
❌ NO Physical Building (The streets of Meadowlands are our studio)

WHO WE NEED:

🎭 ACTORS (Leads & Extras)

Requirements: High discipline, emotional range, and commitment to the "2-on-2-off" schedule. No ego—just talent.

🔊 SOUND & TECHNICAL CREW

Requirements: An ear for detail. Must own a smartphone with storage space to help capture clear audio and shots.

✍️ SCREENWRITERS & CREATIVES

Requirements: Must love Kasi stories and be able to write scripts for local locations.

🏃 PRODUCTION ASSISTANTS (Hustlers)

Requirements: Punctual, organized, and ready to manage the set. If you are 5 minutes early, you are late!

WHY JOIN?
Build a professional portfolio, get listed in our "Green Book" Master Register, and be part of the crew that puts Meadowlands on the global map.

READY TO HUSTLE? APPLY NOW:
👉 https://form.svhrt.com/69b5fc522ac0ef04c5970eab

Casting call!!
Title: Love Thy Neighbor

Shooting: June 18th-June 21st in Savannah, GA

Student film for SCAD, not paid, nonunion 

If interested please go to sophiadarlingcasting.com or email Sophiadarling.casting@gmail.com with your headshot, resume, and what role you are interested in.   PLEASE READ NOTES FOR CHARACTERS

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Love Thy Neighbor Scott Myers Lead. Mixed, Woman, 28-36. A female attorney (and cannibal) with contempt for those who belittle her finds justice through consummation of her perceived aggressors. On paper, a sociopath, her desires for power and justice, sly nature, and impatience causes friction among strangers. Note: The character does handle firearm that is going to be a practical prop. A certified armorer will be present whenever the prop IS. Will be shown smoking a cigarette and will be done practically using herbal cigarettes.'

May be an image of text that says 'Love Thy Neighbor Lainey Supporting. White, Woman, 20-25 Scott's client's niece, who was responsible for hiring Scott to represent her Uncle Nick. Caught in the middle the misunderstanding Lainey's concerned nature leads her to mix in with Scott's and her uncle's affairs. of Note: Will be in a scene with a firearm which will be a practical prop. A certified armorer will be present whenever the pr is.'

May be an image of text that says 'Love LoveThyNeighbor Thy Neighbor Nicholas Burton Day Player. White, Male, 55-65. Scott's client, presumably a frequent offender. A "particular man" as his niece describes him, includes particularities of brashness, sexism, and intolerance for strangers. A "Don't Tread on Me" mentality. He iS casualty of Scott's murderous cannibalism. His desire is to have the upper hand and sovereignty leads to his downfall. Note: The character does handle a firearm that is going to be practical prop. A certified armorer will be present whenever the prop is.'

items.text:
** NOWA PRODUKCJA – SERIAL FABULARNY**

PRZEŻYJ PRZYGODĘ NA PLANIE ZDJĘCIOWYM! 

Szukamy statystów i epizodystów do nowego, współczesnego serialu!

 Warszawa

 Start zdjęć już w maju!

Pierwsze dni zdjęciowe:

4.05 / 5.05 / 11.05 / 12.05 / 13.05 / 15.05 / 16.05

 Gatunek: serial współczesny

 Kogo szukamy?

Osób o różnym wyglądzie i pochodzeniu – zarówno europejskim, jak i etnicznym.

 Wynagrodzenie:

• Statyści – 110 zł (wypłata gotówką po dniu zdjęciowym)

items.text:
Horror Web Series Casting Call in Thornton CO
CASTING CALL - Micro Vertical Found Footage Horror Web Series

Title: "CHAPTER 0"

Logline: A few weeks bedore a new horror escape room's grand opening, unusual experiences cause a paranoid employee to be concerned about the real-life maniac whose grisly murders inspired the game.

Genre: Found Footage Horror

Format: 10 (2-3 minutes each) vertical webisodes

Writer/Directors: Jerrod D. Brito (https://www.sharpspoonpictures.com/about-us.html) & Chris Guite

Executive Producer: Tim Carillo

Shooting Dates: A few flexible shooting nights between May 1st and May 30th

Locations: Thornton, CO

Roles:

RILEY (Lead)

Age: 18-22

Description: A new hire who doesn't enjoy horror, but took a Game Master job at a nearby escape room for the flexible hours and the ability to do homework there at night while waiting for deliveries in the weeks before the escape room opens. Riley is easily spooked, enjoys making vlogs, and though he/she/they isn't afraid of ghosts, nothing chills Riley more than real-life killers.

* These shorts will be roughly scripted, but in the spirit of found footage films, we are primarily looking for natural influencer-type personalities who are able to ad-lib when necessary.

Rate: Let's talk about it.

Duration: 1 month-ish (only a few shoot days, very flexible.)

Shooting Dates: 3-4 flexible nights between May 1st and May 30th, up to 2 hours each.

ROBERT (Cameo)

Age: ???

Description: It could be a tall man in all black, lurking in the shadows, or it could just be our imaginations, our sleepless eyes playing tricks on us. Only our editor knows for sure...

Rate: Let's talk about it.

Duration: 1 month-ish (only a few shoot days, very flexible.)

Shooting Dates: 2-3 flexible nights between May 1st and May 30th, up to 2 hours each.

AUDITION INFO: If you're interested in these roles, please send an email, headshot, resume, your desired fee, and any relevant reels or samples to jerrodbrito@gmail.com with the subject "CHAPTER 0" for consideration. Selected performers will be asked to submit a short video audition based on a prompt.

Thank you!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of fire escape

topComments.text: Interested
Would love to learn more about Riley!

items.text:
CASTING CALL

Title: Where You Came From

Genre: Comedy

Logline: Mauri is leaving for Africa... her mom isn't so sure about that...

Role: Frank. Between late forties and early sixties. Frank is a little bit of a mess, but he is Mauri's father through and through. He's supportive, unprofessional, and maybe a little hungover.

Production Company: This is a UCCS capstone film by Joseph Impellitteri with Christian Winkler and Onyx Riccelli producing

Production Type: Student Film

Contact Information: email me at jvitoimp@gmail.com or text me at 859-444-7502

Run Time: Short (~10 min)

Compensation: Paid ($25)

Union Status: Non-Union (not a hard line though)

Audition Information: Reach out to me; all auditions will be digital

Shooting Schedule: May 3rd, all day (12 hour shoot). Tentatively, 7 am-7 pm

Filming Location: Old North End in Colorado Springs (near downtown)

Project Description: I think the script is funny (bias). If you like comedy, message me!

topComments.text: Message sent

If you need an angsty teen anywhere in there… hit me up! 😂 
I have a 13yo who is ready to perform! 🙌🏽

URGENT - FEMALE DANCERS
URGENT CASTING - Female dancers +170cm (or close)

Location: Phu Quoc, Vietnam Bar, Resturant/ Beach Club

Contract: 

- 6-months to 1 year

- Work visa

- Round trip flights

- Accommodation

- $100 food allowance 

- $1100 per month + Tips

Work:

- 1 Day off per week

- 3 - 4 mini shows

- Gogo freestyle (3-4 sets)

Please email info@studiovgroup.com with videos, photos and Instagram to apply.

TALENT BOOKS NOW OPEN! 
Huge opportunities just landed on our desks, Commercial, TV & film projects 🎬
We are currently looking for 2-17 year olds. 

 The ‘APPLY section’ on website is currently down - APPLY VIA EMAIL
📩 theagencyapplications@gmail.com
Please include:
• Name, age & DOB
• Height & location
• Parent contact details
• Recent headshot + full-length photo
• Experience (if any - not essential)

No experience needed - training available through our academy if local.

#CastingCall #KidsCasting #ActingOpportunity #UKCasting #TalentSearch

items.text: FIRST CLASS FREE!!! (Check out videos on our page.) 🙌😊

sharedPost.text:
Looking for something new and fun to do? That won’t cost the earth but leave you feeling amazing? 🤔

Come and move, laugh and stress bust with us! My BEGINNERS dance classes are for EVERYBODY. (I can’t stress this enough. Even if you think you can’t dance, in my sessions, we don’t care!) 

Just come have a go. We move for the joy of movement and all the benefits it can bring, not for perfection or to look good. (That happens all on its own, over time. 🙌 And if that’s something you’re striving for, then I’ll help you get there. 👌)

Thursday classes begin again on May 14th. Brand new routine, great time to grab a friend and try your first class for FREE!!!! 

Can’t make Thursdays? That’s ok, drop me a message about Monday classes! 🙌

#danceclasses #liverpoolfitness #beginnersdance #tryitchallenge #FreeClass #trybeforeyoubuy #newhobby #liverpooluk

🎬 CASTING DO SPOTU WIDEO - KRAKÓW 

Hej! Szukamy aktorów do klimatycznego spotu video dla branży edukacyjnej. 

📍 MIEJSCE: Kraków 

⌛️CZAS TRWANIA:  3-5 godzin

📅 DATA: 28.04

KOGO SZUKAMY?

 Chłopak (14-18 lat)

- Swobodna przed kamerą

- Bez kwestii mówionych (gra emocją i mimiką)

🎥 O PROJEKCIE

Krótki, dynamiczny spot pokazujący codzienność nastolatka. 

Proszę o zgłoszenia na adres ➡️ [promocja@pzpo.edu.pl](mailto:promocja@pzpo.edu.pl)

Przykład naszej realizacji: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ihdXqT4WjpM](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ihdXqT4WjpM)
items.previewDescription: 👉 Czy współczesna szkoła potrafi naprawdę dostrzegać talenty uczniów i wspierać ich w odkrywaniu pasji? Jakie zmiany rodzice uważają za kluczowe, by edukacj...
items.title: Bo każde dziecko jest inne...

items.text:
ACTING & IMPROV PROGRAM
with Wojciech Medyński

3 months. One group. Real progress.

This is a focused, long-term training for actors and creatives who want to go deeper into the craft.

Not drop-ins. Not surface-level exercises.

A consistent group working week by week on presence, character, and truthful performance.

We use improvisation as a tool to unlock spontaneity, connection, and real reactions on stage.

WHAT YOU’LL WORK ON

On-stage presence and confidence
Character building and objectives
Emotional truth and connection
Listening and reacting in the moment
Improvisation as a foundation for acting
Scene work in pairs and ensemble

WHO THIS IS FOR

Actors, performers, and curious beginners who are ready to commit.

You don’t need experience.
You need willingness to show up and work.

FORMAT

Closed group
Once a week
2 hours per session
3-month program

Small group to keep the work focused and personal.

INSTRUCTOR

Wojciech Medyński

Professional actor working across theatre, film, and television.
Trained at the Łódź Film School.
Experience in Teatr Jaracza and Teatr Syrena in Warsaw.

DETAILS

Atlas Tower, Warsaw
Starts in May

Exact day and time confirmed based on the group.

PRICE

1500 PLN full program
500 PLN monthly option

Limited spots.

If you’re ready to commit and go deeper, join us.

Presented by Impact Warsaw
Perform. Create. Connect.

items.text:
**Sesja zdjęciowa**

Gdzie: **Warszawa**

Kto: **fotograf**

Kogo: **modela**, chłopaka o szczupłej/sportowej sylwetce

Brak wymaganego doświadczenia w pozowaniu, wystarczą chęci

Kiedy: **25 kwiecień 2026 sobota**

**Sesja zdjęciowa na zasadach TFP czyli pozowanie za zdjęcia.**

Do projektu fotograficznego w celu poszerzenia własnego portfolio szukam modela. Tak jak wcześniej pisałem, nie wymagam doświadczenia w pozowaniu. Sesja obejmuje zdjęcia portretowe, sylwetkowe i akty. Miejsce: jedna z warszawskich galerii w okolicy dworca zachodniego. Zależy mi m.in. na pokazaniu emocji całym ciałem. Szczegóły do omówienia w PW. Tylko osoby pełnoletnie.

**PS.** Zdjęcie dla uwagi

sharedPost.text:
🎧 10.000 Downloads – ich bin überwältigt!
Was für ein Meilenstein! 🎉 Mein Podcast für Gesang & Stimme hat 10.000 Downloads erreicht – und das verdanke ich euch. Danke, danke, danke! 🙏
Im Podcast dreht sich alles rund ums Singen:
🎙️ Atmung & Stimmklang
🎵 Gesangstechnik für alle Level
🧠 Wissen aus der Stimmwissenschaft
🎤 Bühnenpräsenz & Ausdruck
✨ Impulse für deinen Übungsalltag
Egal ob du gerade erst anfängst oder schon lange singst – hier ist für jeden etwas dabei! Alle 2 Monate gibt es eine neue Folge mit frischer Inspiration. 🌟
Du findest den Podcast auf:
🟢 Spotify
🍎 Apple Podcasts
🎵 Deezer
📖 Audible
📺 RTL+
👉 Unter Linktree in der Bio oder direkt unter www.singasong-behappy.de/podcast-fur-gesang-und-stimme
Sing A Song – Be Happy! 🎶
Deine Bernadette 😊
#podcast #gesangspodcast #stimme #singen #gesang #singenlernen #gesangsunterricht #gesangsunterrichtberlin #stimmbildung #vocal #spotify #applepodcasts #10000downloads #meilenstein #singasongbehappy #musikpodcast #gesangstipps #stimmtraining #berlin #onlinekurs

items.text:
Hi everyone,

I’m Chandu, currently based in London, and I’m actively looking for opportunities as a **Production Runner / Floor Runner** in film and television.

I have hands-on experience supporting live media environments through my role with Black Leaders in TV, working on logistics, coordination, and fast-paced event setups. I’m highly organised, proactive, and comfortable working under pressure — always ready to support wherever needed on set.

I also have acting experience, which helps me understand on-set dynamics and work effectively with talent and guests.

I’m available immediately and open to short-term, freelance, or last-minute runner roles across London.

If anyone is looking for a reliable and hardworking runner, I’d really appreciate the opportunity.

📩 [chandunampelly04@gmail.com](mailto:chandunampelly04@gmail.com)

items.title: Hi everyone,

items.text:
Casting call for upcoming production (unpaid)
Hello there

We are looking for two actors to appear in an upcoming play in June. Please note this is an unpaid opportunity 

The Edge tells the story of Elle and Nathan a couple who are fighting to stay together despite being at totally different stages in their lives

Actors based in Manchester and surrounding areas

Time/venue: The Kings Arms, Salford. 7 30pm

Rehearsals are weekly 

Characters we are casting 

Matthew (18-25) Male- A bi-sexual runner who attracts Nathan's attention 

Health visitor/social worker (24+) Female

Social worker who is involved with Elle and Nathan's case

If anyone is interested please send your interest to my email jontypleslie@gmail.com or send me a DM for any queries

items.text:
**Mini serial  1940 – ‘’ 2 podoficer Waffen SS  -  mężczyzna  (casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje  mężczyzny w wieku 30 – 40 do roli podoficera Waffen SS . Szukamy osoby bez zarostu oraz tatuaży na twarzy. Postać będzie mieć kwestie po niemiecku. Mile widziana osoba z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrza czy Katowic. Wystąpi w kilku odcinkach. Zdjęcia próbne realizujemy  w Gliwicach. Spotykamy się w wybrane niedziele z wyprzedzeniem 1 2 tygodniowym.  

 

**Od czerwca 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

[https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g)

https://www.instagram.com/lukasz.magiera.official

** **

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy matki francuskiej dziewczynki ( casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje kobiety **w wieku 30 – 35 lat** do roli matki francuskiej dziewczynki. Kobieta wystąpi w 2 scenach ataku Niemców na budynek cywilny. W jednej scenie postać matki dziewczynki ma dialog po francusku ze swoją córką. Mile widziana osoba **z Gliwic lub okolic, Zabrze czy Katowice.** Szukamy kogoś bez farbowanych włosów, bez malowanych paznokci czy braku tatuaży na twarzy. Zdjęcia próbne planujemy **17.05.26 między 10:30 a 15:00 ( Niedziela )**

items.text:
Casting "Botanically Brontë," a new immersive theatre production (York/Profit Share)
Currently in development, combining literary performance, cinematic visuals, and a curated cocktail experience. 

Inspired by the lives and works of the Brontë family, the piece moves through the seasons of life—spring, summer, autumn, and winter— blending extracts from "Jane Eyre," "Wuthering Heights," "Agnes Grey," and Brontë poetry. The experience runs approximately 90–95 minutes, with three intervals during which audiences are served bespoke cocktails, each designed to reflect the emotional and sensory world of the scenes. This is a development-led project, and performers will play an active role in shaping the work. Production is particularly keen to hear from actors with immersive/improvisation experience and performers with experience in the performance/hospitality sector.

Note: Due to nature of performance/alcohol licensing strictly 18+ casting.

Apply via Mandy or email info@wildflowerwildfire.com for further casting information

Additional info: This is a profit share/deferred payment project. Net box office profit (ticket income minus essential running costs and expenses) will be shared among the cast and core creative team. Production will provide clear and transparent reporting of income and costs throughout. This production is being developed as a pilot, with the intention of moving into a fully funded, paid run.

items.text:
# Chasing Shadows - Pilot Episode
--

Seeking cast & crew for an online TV show adaptation of a novel, "Chasing Shadows," a crime/thriller/romance centred around Astrid Clarke, an English FBI agent, who is put on a case surrounding a gang who have the FBI chasing their tails. She is forced to choose where her loyalties lie when her brother is revealed to be in the gang, too.

---

UNPAID - Do not apply if you live outside of Cambridgeshire, as production can’t guarantee travel will be covered at this time. A fundraiser will be created, and travel reimbursements will be discussed among the producer/director, should the target be hit. Depending on how much the fundraiser raises, anything left will be discussed between the producer and director as to payment, dependent on role significance.

Once filming has finished, an IMDB page will be created, and everyone will receive a credit. Food will also be sorted on set, all vegetarian-friendly to avoid dietary issues (unless specifically requested)

---

Shoots in June or early July (to avoid the summer holidays in the UK) within the Cambridgeshire area. Exact locations and dates TBD.

---

This DOES NOT apply to crew. The process is this: Prescreen, Script exert, Chem test, offer. Usually, within a week of each stage. Any communication would take place via Zoom :-)

Please include your location (e.g., Ely/Cambridge/Peterborough) and your availability for June/July. Production estimates a maximum of one week to shoot. A schedule will be created shortly for definitive dates.

--

Full listing info (including character specifics) here:

This DOES NOT apply to crew. The process is this: Prescreen, Script exert, Chem test, offer. Usually, within a week of each stage. Any communication would take place via Zoom :-)

Please include your location (e.g., Ely/Cambridge/Peterborough) and your availability for June/July. Production estimates a maximum of one week to shoot. A schedule will be created shortly for definitive dates.

--

Full listing info (including character specifics) here:

items.text:
*🎮 CASTING DO GRY HORROR „PĘTLA KARY” 🎮*

Ważne info!! Nie pisać zainteresowany/zainteresowana tylko odrazu prosze wysyłać zgłoszenia na priv! Prosze, bo to serio utrudnia mi proces selekcji ludzi po postaciach i prosze dokładnie czytać post ponieważ wiele osób wysyła zgłoszenie nie według wzoru, zaaktualizowałem w tym edicie benefity z współpracy oraz schemat zgłoszenia

Tworzę grę z gatunku horror psychologiczny o moralnych wyborach. (Inspirowanym serią filmów Piła)
Szukam osób pełnoletnich 18–67 lat_, które chcą użyczyć grze swojej twarzy i/lub głosu.

*UWAGA:* To dzieło fikcji. Gra nie gloryfikuje przemocy, nie nawołuje do łamania prawa. To studium winy i konsekwencji.

_Role dzieci 3–17 lat: wyłącznie za pisemną zgodą opiekuna prawnego. Postaci dziecięce nie biorą udziału w scenach przemocy. Głos może być nagrany przez dorosłego aktora.

*👥 Kogo szukam?*  
- *Wizerunku* – Twoja twarz/sylwetka jako postać 3D w grze
- *Głosu* – dubbing/dialogi postaci

*🎁 Co oferuję?*  
- *💰 Wynagrodzenie:* 200 zł płatne po podpisaniu umowy + % z zysków netto ze sprzedaży gry, na podstawie umowy licencyjnej: 0,2% statysta, 0,5% postać drugoplanowa, 1% postać pierwszoplanowa Cena gry: 150 zł więc sobie obliczcie
- *🎭 Twoja postać w grze:* imię w napisach końcowych, wpływ na wygląd postaci
- *🎮 Dostęp do testów:* zamknięta wersja beta po podpisaniu NDA, na prośbę
- *🆓 Klucz do gry:* darmowa kopia po premierze

*📄 Formalności i RODO*  
1. Z wybranymi osobami podpisuję *umowę o wykorzystanie wizerunku* i/lub *umowę o dzieło/licencyjną na głos*.
2. Umowa określa: zakres, terytorium, czas użycia, wynagrodzenie, Twoje prawa osobiste.
3. Dane osobowe i nadesłane materiały przetwarzam zgodnie z RODO, tylko na potrzeby castingu i produkcji. Nie udostępniam osobom trzecim. Masz prawo do wglądu, poprawy i usunięcia danych.
4. Udzielasz niewyłącznej licencji na wykorzystanie wizerunku/głosu tylko w grze _Pętla Kary_ i materiałach promocyjnych.
5. Wypłata wynagrodzenia po podpisaniu umowy i przekazaniu materiałów.

---

*📸 ZGŁOSZENIA – WIZERUNEK*  
Wyślij PW z tytułem: `Pętla Kary - Wizerunek: [Imię postaci z listy]`  

*1. Filmik 30-90s* opowiadający o sobie:  
Imię, nazwisko, wiek, wzrost, cechy szczególne, zainteresowania, dlaczego ten projekt?

*2. Zdjęcia:* en face, profil, cała sylwetka. Dobre światło, neutralne tło.

*3. Jeśli chcesz też dubbingować*, dodaj próbki głosu .wav/.mp3 w emocjach: radość, smutek, złość, spokój, strach, panika, rozpacz  

*🎤 ZGŁOSZENIA – GŁOS*  
Wyślij PW z tytułem: `Pętla Kary - Głos: [Imię postaci z listy]`  

*1. Nagranie 30-90s* opowiadające o sobie:  
Imię, nazwisko, wiek, wzrost, cechy szczególne, zainteresowania, dlaczego ten projekt?

*2. Próbki głosu* .wav/.mp3 w emocjach: radość, smutek, złość, spokój, strach, panika, rozpacz
---

*📅 Rekrutacja trwa do: 23.08.2026*  
*🚀 Start skanów/nagrań: 01.09.2026*  
Wybranym osobom udostępnię szczegółowy profil postaci i fragment scenariusza.

---

_Role dzieci oznaczone _ - tylko za zgodą opiekuna. Brak scen przemocy z udziałem dzieci.

---

*🔥 Wejdziesz do Pętli czy zostaniesz widzem? Decyzja należy do Ciebie.*

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – 48H FILM PROJECT 
Hey! I’m a film director casting for a short film in the 48HFP Film Festival (May 29–31). We’ll write, shoot, and edit the film within 48 hours. Best film from Poland goes to the international final (Filmapalooza) and can even go to Cannes!

📍 Location: Warsaw, Poland

We’re looking for: 

Actors / Actresses (18+, any age range, can act in English)

Looking for people who are:

- Comfortable with fast-paced shooting and quick changes

- Able to commit fully for the weekend (May 29–31)

- Reliable, collaborative, and open to direction

- Okay with improvisation 

No professional experience required – just passion, energy, and availability.

Unpaid project, but great experience, networking, and festival exposure.

DM me with a short intro and any experience (if you have it) 💌

topComments.text:

Mogę być Babcią Weronika Skwaroń , z którą już miałam okazję pracować na planie filmowym.
Mój instagram renata.szkup 
Mam również ADHD 😁
hi, check ur dm🌸

items.text:
CGTV question 
Did anyone take their kid to a CGTV audition and not get a callback saying they were picked as one of the 50?

My daughter got called back and told she was one of the few but I was just wondering if they say that to everyone.

topComments.text: Scam. Everyone gets invited back your a paying customer. You can self submit to agencies for free. It should never cost you anything to get in front of an agent. Go on the sag list and self submit for free! CGTV, Barbizon, ipop, etc are all unnecessary cash grabs that target unsuspecting parents.
It’s a scam, everyone gets invited, and they charge huge fees for kids’ representation.

I’ll be at the Wessagussett Wetland and Woodland - Historic Conservation Site on Saturday, April 25th 9-12 for the Town Wide Clean Up.

I’ll be back with the crew on Saturday, May 2 for our Annual Earth Day Festivities from 10am to 5pm!

We will be doing Invasive Plant removal - digging up Garlic Mustard!!  

Hope to see you there!!

items.text:
# Chasing Shadows - Pilot Episode
--

Seeking cast & crew for an online TV show adaptation of a novel, "Chasing Shadows," a crime/thriller/romance centred around Astrid Clarke, an English FBI agent, who is put on a case surrounding a gang who have the FBI chasing their tails. She is forced to choose where her loyalties lie when her brother is revealed to be in the gang, too.

---

UNPAID - Do not apply if you live outside of Cambridgeshire, as production can’t guarantee travel will be covered at this time. A fundraiser will be created, and travel reimbursements will be discussed among the producer/director, should the target be hit. Depending on how much the fundraiser raises, anything left will be discussed between the producer and director as to payment, dependent on role significance.

Once filming has finished, an IMDB page will be created, and everyone will receive a credit. Food will also be sorted on set, all vegetarian-friendly to avoid dietary issues (unless specifically requested)

---

Shoots in June or early July (to avoid the summer holidays in the UK) within the Cambridgeshire area. Exact locations and dates TBD.

---

This DOES NOT apply to crew. The process is this: Prescreen, Script exert, Chem test, offer. Usually, within a week of each stage. Any communication would take place via Zoom :-)

Please include your location (e.g., Ely/Cambridge/Peterborough) and your availability for June/July. Production estimates a maximum of one week to shoot. A schedule will be created shortly for definitive dates.

--

Full listing info (including character specifics) here: https://www.backstage.com/casting/chasing-shadows-pilot-episode-3151533/?role_id=5524378&role_id=5524373&role_id=5524369

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL for a SHORT fantasy film - PAID roles- CHICAGO **

**PROJECT TITLE: Shed**

**PROJECT TYPE:** Short film Drama/Fantasy

**PRODUCTION COMPANY:** Searching Productions

**PRODUCTION TEAM: Writer/Director - Stephanie Jeter; EP - Lilly Wachowski**

**UNION STATUS: **Open to union and non-union actors -**PAID**

**PROJECT SYNOPSIS:** A couple’s harmonious relationship begins to unravel when the woman comes home to unexpectedly find a locked shed in her back yard and a husband who won’t tell her what’s inside.

**LOCATION**: Chicago, IL or surrounding area (exact location TBD)

**SHOOT DATES: June 1-June 7**

**ROLES:**

**These roles are for actors local to Chicagoland only**

**LAYLA** - woman, 30-39, Black: A high-achieving soror type whose curiosity might be getting the best of her. 

**RANDALL** - man, 30-39, Black, Asian, or Indigenous: An easygoing and sensitive man in the midst of an identity crisis. 

**LITTLE BOY** - boy, 8-11, Black, Asian, or Indigenous: Newly recovered from a battle with a life-threatening illness he tries his best to present a brave face for his family. (This is a non-speaking role.)

EXPECTED HOURS: TBD

ADDITIONAL COMPENSATION: Transportation reimbursement (capped)

**SUBMISSION DETAILS: Please send a head shot, resume, and reel (if available) to** **ShedFilmChi@gmail.com**, 

**SUBJECT:  ‘Cast submission -***** Role*****’.** 

**Please submit no later than April 29, 2026.**

**If you are invited to audition, we will provide sides and ask that you submit a self-taped audition.*

**CALL BACKS:** Callbacks and chemistry reads will be held between May 4th and May 7th in Chicago.

Follow us on: Instagram **shed.movie**

items.text:
***[Casting Call - Malay Kids Cooking Show]***

The Moving Visuals Co. is currently looking for kids to feature in an upcoming Malay Kids Cooking Show, "Ai Ai Cef 2"

**Details:**

**Film Period: **30th May 2026 - 11th June 2026. Kids are only needed for one day from period mentioned.

**Deadline**

Submit ASAP **(Best By end of April). **Contact the number below if more time is needed.

**Requirements**

1. Aged 7-12

2. Can converse in Malay

3. Fun & Out-Going

4. Have basic cooking skills. (Able to follow a recipe)

If interested do send in a recent photo and one minute video of introducing yourself with answers to the following questions. Video is to be done in Malay.

* What is your favourite food?

* What are the food(s) that you like to cook and why?

For more questions & submission of deliverables, do send in an email to production3@tmvc.sg & CC naqeaosman@tmvc.sg & casting@tmvc.sg

Feel free to contact me ( Iman ) at 9326 3626

items.text:
CASTING CALL – INDEPENDENT FEATURE FILM
Project Title: Shadows of Choice 
Production Type: Independent Feature Film
Shoot Dates: 8th – 10th of May 
Location: Denver, Colorado 
Compensation: $500/day + Reel + IMDb Credit

SYNOPSIS
Over the course of one night, strangers cross paths in a town preparing for change. Quiet conversations, withheld truths, and irreversible choices unfold in the spaces between what is said and what remains hidden proving that even brief encounters can leave lasting consequences.
NOW CASTING – LEAD & SUPPORTING ROLES

LEAD ROLES
Aaron (Male, 18–23)
Measured, introspective, and quietly intelligent. Carries a strong sense of responsibility that often isolates him from others. Struggles with choosing between personal ambition and loyalty to those who depend on him.

Nina (Female, 18–24)
Calm, observant, and emotionally disciplined. Appears self-assured, but avoids vulnerability by maintaining control. Highly perceptive of others’ motives, yet hesitant to confront her own emotional truths.

Brielle (Female, 19–25)
Bold, expressive, and confrontational when cornered. Lives impulsively, masking fear with confidence and wit. Beneath her tough exterior is a deep longing for stability she doesn’t know how to ask for.

SUPPORTING ROLES

Ivy (Female, 18–23)
Soft-spoken and reflective. Often underestimated due to her quiet nature, but possesses emotional insight and moral clarity that influence the choices of those around her.

Mr. Lowell (Male or Female, 30s–40s)
Grounded, patient, and thoughtful. A natural listener who offers guidance without imposing judgment. Carries unresolved feelings about missed chances and unspoken truths from earlier in life.

TO SUBMIT
Please email the following materials to castingportals@gmail.com
Current headshot
Acting résumé or demo reel (if available)
Role(s) you’re submitting for
City of residence

topComments.text: I'm interested in the role of Brielle and Nina, I'm 28,but I look young.  Let me know if that's okay and I will send you an email
Two days for a feature film? 🤔

items.text:
Next Sunday!  Pueblo Memorial Hall. Doors open at 5:30pm

Come check out one of the biggest film festivals in Colorado!  

https://www.kickassfilmfest.com/event-details/kick-ass-film-fest-red-carpet-award-ceremony-live-2026

sharedPost.text:
🎬 This is the BIG event. The 2026 Kickass Film Fest Red Carpet & Awards Show is where it all comes together. May 3rd, at Pueblo Memorial Hall tickets on sale now.

✨ Walk the Red Carpet with the Stars
🎥 Watch the Top 7 films created in just 72 hours
🏆 Experience a high-energy live awards show

Colorado’s top filmmakers, actors, and creatives… all in one room.
From the moment you walk in, it’s energy. Cameras flashing. Interviews rolling. A full red carpet experience hosted by Minnequa Works Credit Union. Then we hit the screen to see the best film nominees. The real stories behind them. Live Q&A with the creators. And then… we crown the winners!

🍿 This Sunday, May 3rd at Pueblo Memorial Hall
Doors open at 5:00pm
Red Carpet starts at 5:30pm
Screening + Q&A at 6:30pm
Awards to follow hosted by @novameets

🎟️ www.kickassfilmfest.com/tickets

items.text: I am producing a music video on Saturday, May 9th, and I am looking for several distinctive elements to enhance the production. These elements include celebrity impersonators, a snake measuring three feet or longer, a belly dancer, a donkey or goat, and a little person. Additionally, any unusual or extraordinary elements would be welcome. The event will offer unlimited 420 and catered food. Payment will be discussed. Please help me locate these elements. Thank you.

items.text:
**Looking for a new type of Acting Class?**

Actors based in or near to Manchester, 

Actor and acting coach Andrew Ellis (This is England, The Walk-In, This is Going to Hurt) is now running weekly acting classes in South Manchester. 

Andy’s classes are different from most! Firstly Andy has over 20 years experience in the industry working with some of the biggest Directors and Actors in the business!

Andy’s classes are proactive, on your feet lessons where **Doing** is the done thing! 

 

Andy is also a keen director and film maker bringing that skill set into the lessons means that each monthly block **You walk away with two showreel style quality scenes! **

All for the bargain price of just £85 for four classes! 

Email [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) to book!

items.text:
**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy **

**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

**Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** meets

- **Organic Breathing** & **Image Work**

- **Kutiyattam Traditional Sanskrit Theatre** (Kerala, India) 

- **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 

- **The Actor’s Energy and Presence **

- **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: **Jesper Michelsen**, Denmark; **Remith Ramesh**, India; **Gülhan Kadim**, Turkey; **Yiğit Sertdemir**, Turkey; **Suzana Nikolić**, Croatia; **Ulrich Meyer-Horsch**, Germany; and guest artists from Southern Africa, USA, Singapore, and India 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS **

This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**

There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 

The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: Making Contact: Living Images 

Full announcement incl. application: https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/

Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de

**WARSZAWA**

**30 kwietnia (czwartek)**

** **

*Proszę o nie zgłaszanie się panów, którzy już wysłali zgłoszenie*.

** **

Doszukujemy jeszcze panów na plan filmu "Kosmonauta" na 30.04. Wiek od 18 lat w górę bez ograniczeń.

 

**Stawka 200 zł gotówką po planie (dzień zdjęciowy 130 zł + charakteryzacja 70 zł)**

** **

Charakteryzacja dzisiaj 27.04 i jutro 28.04. Na strzyżenie są zapraszane tylko wybrane osoby.

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS 30**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

W załączniku: **zdjęcie twarzy (selfie) i sylwetki: TYLKO Z DNIA ZGŁOSZENIA + zdjęcie z profilu**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

@wszyscy

WARSZAWA 30.04.2026r.
REKLAMA SIECI SKLEPÓW SPOŻYWCZYCH

Zgłoszenia przyjmuję do czwartku 23.04 do końca dnia.

SZUKAMY:
- Mężczyzna, aktor - w wieku 28-36 - typ śmiesznego ziomka - rola mówiona.
- Musisz mieć komediowy sznyt. Chętnie coś charakterystycznego w urodzie.

TERMINY:
- 28 lub 29.04.2026 Przymiarki (dokładny dzień zostanie potwierdzony)
- 30.04.2026 ZDJĘCIA W WARSZAWIE

STAWKA:
Stawka: 1500 dzień zdjęciowy + 8000 prawa (12 miesięcy - all media)

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl 
W tytule maila: R30 
Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wizytówkę jako link do YT, wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki.

W odpowiedzi na wybrane zgłoszenia prześlę scenkę do nagrania, prawa oraz link do formularza.

Do zobaczenia na planie!

items.text:
**Social Media Coordinator**: 

A NYC-based venture studio / media collective is looking for an early-career Social Media Coordinator to support content across a growing community platform and a founder/creator-led personal brand.

This is a good fit for someone who is creative, organized, culturally plugged in, and has a strong aesthetic point of view. You do not need to be a filmmaker or professional director, but you should have good visual taste, understand what feels current, and be able to help make content feel polished, intentional, and culturally relevant.

**What you’ll help with:**
* Editing photos, short-form videos, and reels
* Creating social media collateral for events, launches, and community updates
* Helping brainstorm post ideas, captions, hooks, and content formats
* Organizing content libraries and light social media scheduling
* Supporting both community-facing and founder/creator-facing content

**Ideal background:**
* 1–2 years of social media, content, editing, or creator experience
* Comfortable with Instagram, TikTok, Canva, CapCut, or similar tools
* Strong visual taste and a clear creative POV
* Interested in media, tech, startups, culture, and community-building
* NYC-based or NYC-adjacent preferred

**Time commitment:** Approximately 10–15 hours per month
**Pay:** Hourly paid role, appropriate for an early-career/social media assistant position. 
**Perks:** Invites to events across media, startups, film, TV, and South Asians in Media networks. 

To apply, email **[niknyc2023@gmail.com](mailto:niknyc2023@gmail.com)** with a short note, your resume or LinkedIn, and 2–3 examples of social or creative work.
items.title: Pay Transparency

topComments.text: Hi! Please make sure to disclose a pay range in accordance with the nyc pay transparency law. https://dol.ny.gov/pay-transparency

items.text:
42nd Street Auditions!
**SEEKING**: Local, Non-Equity performers for various roles and ensemble in the upcoming 2026  production of 42nd STREET. Performers of all ethnic and racial backgrounds are encouraged to attend.

**LOCATION**: Delray Beach Playhouse *(950 NW 9th Street Delray Beach, FL 33444) *

**PREPARATION**
* Prepare 32 bars of a musical theatre song in the style of the show. Bring sheet music. An  accompanist is provided but may not transpose.  
* You may be asked to sing another selection or from the score.  
* You may be asked to dance. Bring appropriate clothing and shoes (including tap  shoes).  
* Please bring 1 copy of your picture/resume, glued or stapled together (if available)

**DATE and TIME OF AUDITION:** 
* Monday, May 18 between 6pm and 10pm
* Tuesday, May 19 between 6pm and 10pm
* *Show Runs: 8/21/26 – 9/13/26 (weekends)*

**PERSONNEL: ** Producer: Kevin Barrett, Director: Michael Ursua, Choreographer: Alex Jorth, Musical Director: Michael Ursua. A monitor will be provided. 

***For ******Sign Up Slots******, Character Breakdowns and more Audition info, click here: ***https://auditionsmanager.com/registration.php?AU=K8KcDx1822

Please do not call the Playhouse box office with questions regarding these auditions. Please email questions to dbpauditions@gmail.com.

items.text:
Hello, my name is Shokquail Letrail Bobbitt. I’m an up-and-coming actor based in East Stroudsburg, PA, looking to get my name out there and be a part of meaningful, creative projects.

I’m 21 years old, 6’1”, African American.

I’m especially interested in trauma-driven roles, dramatic leads, mentally complex characters, romantic dramas, and comedy—but I’m open to exploring anything that challenges me and helps me grow.

I bring strong emotional depth, focus, and a willingness to fully commit to every role I take on.

If you’re casting or working on a project and need someone dedicated, versatile, and ready to work, feel free to reach out. Let’s create something real.

Join the Creative Circle — Future Opportunities
Hee creatives!

I’m developing an immersive art & theatre project in London, and we’re wrapping up our crew. If you’re an actor, writer, director, or any form of artist, we’d love to stay connected—we’re always looking for creatives for future opportunities!

Follow for updates:
Personal Instagram: @sunnyleevandijk
Production Company: @piratequeen_productions

Or drop your email in this form [https://forms.gle/v6Y4TJ2a2AU2KSRq5](https://forms.gle/v6Y4TJ2a2AU2KSRq5) to be first to hear about new calls, early invites, and behind-the-scenes updates. Let’s build something awesome together!

items.text:
Markus Burghardt spricht bei Christian Weiße in Teil 2 offen über Liebe, Leben, Lust und Geld. Du erfährst, wie Asien ihn geprägt hat, wie sein Coming-out verlief und warum er Freiheit heute kritischer sieht. 

In Teil 2 meiner Karrideo TV "Storie" aus der Reihe "Setgeflüster" führe ich Markus Burghardt deutlich tiefer in seine Biografie. Ausgehend von seiner sportlichen Ausstrahlung und seinem Lebensstil geht das Gespräch schnell in die Themen, die diesen Teil so besonders machen: Asien, Selbstfindung, Sexualität, Familie, Geld, Freiheit und Unternehmertum. 

Als Gastgeber halte ich das Gespräch bewusst offen, direkt und persönlich. Ich greife seine Antworten auf, bohre an den richtigen Stellen nach und führe Markus Burghardt von Wassersport, Reisen und Sri Lanka hin zu sehr intimen Stationen seines Lebenswegs. Dadurch entsteht kein oberflächlicher Talk, sondern ein ehrliches Studio-Gespräch mit Ecken, Geschichte und Haltung. 

Markus erzählt, wie früh ihn Asien geprägt hat, wie sein Weg als schwuler Mann begann, wie Familie zunächst mit Bruch reagierte und sich später vieles veränderte. Dazu kommen starke Passagen über Geld, Luxus, Unabhängigkeit, alte Freiräume, heutige Oberflächlichkeiten und seinen Blick auf Nachtleben, Apps und Begegnungen. 

Teil 2 funktioniert für sich allein, baut aber zugleich Spannung für Teil 3 auf. Dort geht es noch gezielter um das Unternehmertum von Markus Burghardt. Wenn Du Gespräche magst, die nicht geschniegelt, sondern echt sind, bist Du hier genau richtig. 

Schreib in die Kommentare, welcher Moment zwischen mir als Gastgeber und Markus Burghardt Dich in Teil 2 am stärksten gepackt hat. 

Welche Passage zeigt für Dich am stärksten, wie sehr Liebe, Freiheit und Selbstbild vom jeweiligen Zeitgeist geprägt werden? 

Abonnier Karrideo TV und aktiviere die Glocke, damit Du Teil 3 mit Markus Burghardt nicht verpasst. 

Schreib in die Kommentare, welche Frage von Christian Weiße in Teil 2 das Gespräch am stärksten geöffnet hat. 

Teile das Video mit Menschen, die ehrliche Studio-Gespräche mit Haltung und Biografie mögen. 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Trauerreden Engelsfeder mit Herz aka Meine FSJ und BFD Erlebnisse 

#MarkusBurghardt #ChristianWeiße #Setgefluester #KarrideoTV #LiebeLebenLustGeld

items.text:
**Actors with or without prior experience are welcome.**

You may apply even without a CV or filmography. Just send your recent photos (headshot, side profile, full body) and basic information (age, height, contact details).

‼️ **CASTING CALL FOR A SHORT FILM** ‼️

📍 Shoot: June 2026 | Cavite

⸻

📌 **ROLES:**

**MATT / THEO**

Male, 16–17 years old (screen age)

⸻

📌 **SUBMISSION DETAILS:**

Send your:

* Recent photos (headshot, side profile, full body)
* Basic information (name, age, height, contact details)
* Sample works / CV / reel (**only** if available)

📧 **projectpagkislap@gmail.com**

🗓 Deadline: April 24, 11:59 PM

**Shortlisted applicants will be contacted for audition materials and further instructions.**

Talent fee, food, and transportation will be provided.

⸻

For inquiries, please contact via email only.

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors ready to build a working career (not just train)?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Jersey Boys (directed by Clint Eastwood) and played Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time.

I’ve been so grateful for the wave of interest and messages recently. It’s been amazing connecting with so many of you.

I’m now offering something I wish existed when I was starting out:

A 2-hour, 1:1 career mentorship session over Zoom.

One of the biggest frustrations I hear is this:
Actors are told “get an agent” but then once they have one, nothing happens.
And for many actors, the challenge is figuring out how to get an agent in the first place.

This session is designed for both.

We sit down and go through:
• What actually makes an actor book work (beyond just talent)
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t yet have an agent
• The materials you really need and what most actors get wrong
• How to approach auditions and self-tapes strategically
• Building a career that moves forward, not just sideways

You’ll leave with a clear, actionable plan so you’re not stuck wondering when the next audition is coming or why you’re not booking. You’ll know exactly what steps to take to create the career you want. 

If you’ve been feeling stuck or unsure, feel free to message me for details or to book.

🚨🔥🚨PARTICIPANT INQUIRY🚨🔥🔥

Are you an orphan… and STILL standing?

Your story could be the one that helps someone else survive theirs.

We’re officially requesting participants for our powerful biographical docuseries ORPHANZ,  a project rooted in truth, healing, and legacy. If you’ve experienced the loss of both parents, grew up without knowing them, or had to navigate life through unimaginable circumstances… your voice matters.

This is more than a series.
This is visibility. This is healing. This is impact.

📩 Submit your story today (written or video), along with a photo and contact info.
Let your journey inspire someone who feels like they’re walking it alone.

#OrphanzDocuseries #CastingCall #AllThingsAuthentic #Healing #RealStories #DocumentarySeries

@allthingsauthentic @back2thebasicspmg

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – STUDENT SHORT FILM (LONDON, UNPAID)**

We’re casting for *“Jumpers for Goalposts,”* a coming-of-age short film at the London College of Communication.

**Logline:**
A London-set story exploring masculinity and body image within a local football team.

**SHOOT DATES:**
May 5th–12th (exact dates vary by role)

**LOCATION:** London (football ground + interior location)

ROLES:

**ROBBIE (Lead)**
Male, 17–23
A bench player struggling with body image and masculinity. Stocky build.
*White / European descent. Previous acting experience preferred.*

**CLIVE (Supporting)**
Male, 35–60
A local football coach. Informal, crass, blunt.
*Previous acting experience preferred.*

**MUM (Supporting)**
Female, 35–60
Robbie's mum. Caring and affectionate, close with Robbie.
*White / European descent. Previous acting experience preferred.*

**COLE (Supporting)**
Male, 17–23
The team’s best player. Confident, obnoxious, antagonistic toward Robbie.
*Previous acting experience preferred.*

**FOOTBALL PLAYERS (Extras)**
Male, 17–25
Background players on the team. No acting experience required.

TO APPLY:

Please send an email to jumpersforgoalpostsfilm@outlook.com with your name, headshot, CV, and any showreels if applicable.

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL — OneTigris Brand Video Production**

We're shooting a 2-day commercial video campaign for **OneTigris** (onetigris.com), a leading tactical outdoor gear brand, and we're looking for talented on-camera performers in the **Los Angeles area**!

📅 **Shoot Days: May 2 & May 3** — you must be available for BOTH days to apply.

**🟠 ROLE 1 — MAIN TALENT (Male)** 📋 1 spot | Mid-20s to mid-30s | Paid
* Primary on-camera presence across all brand videos
* Must be comfortable and confident on camera
* Capable of handling tactical/outdoor gear scenes
* Athletic, active look that fits an outdoor lifestyle brand
* Commercial or brand experience a plus

⏱ **May 2:** Full day (~10 hrs) | **May 3:** Partial day (~6 hrs) 💰 **Rate: $300 per half-day**

**🟠 ROLE 2 — SUPPORTING TALENT (Female)** 📋 1 spot | Mid-20s to mid-30s | Paid
* Background and supporting roles (gym, security, lifestyle scenes)
* Split-screen and contrast shots with main talent
* Hand model shots featuring gear and accessories
* Pickup and coverage footage
* Easygoing, versatile, collaborative on set

⏱ **May 2:** Partial day (~6–8 hrs) | **May 3:** Partial day (~3–4 hrs) 💰 **Rate: $200 per half-day**

**🟠 Background Performers** 1–2 additional background performers may be needed. 💰 **Rate: $200 per half-day**

⚠️ **Please only apply if you are available for BOTH May 2 and May 3.** We are unable to accommodate partial availability for these roles.

**📩 TO APPLY, email casting@rarefloweragency.com:** 

✔ Your name & contact info 

✔ 2–3 recent photos (including one full-body) 

✔ Brief bio or any on-camera/commercial experience 

✔ Confirmation that you're available May 2 & 3

TITLE & TYPE: Pilot

CASTING: Any gender, ages ranges 18+ and up

LOCATION: Greater Washington DC area (Silver Spring, Fredericksburg, Baltimore, Richmond, etc. 

COMPENSATION: Selected participants will receive a paid stipend, plus the show will pay for the filmed/resulting "judgement"

CONTACT: robin@potenciapics.com

TIME(s): Casting NOW (4/27) until May 18th, 2026 Filming dates TBD 

ANYTHING ELSE: Non-union. We're looking for REAL people in the greater Washington DC area who have gone through civil, family, or small claims court, and are willing to revisit and share their case- we want to hear from you! If you're not in the DC area, please feel free to share with people there. We're casting until May 18th. Paid stipend for individuals selected to participate. Check out the casting notice for details.

MORE INFO, PLEASE EMAIL BEFORE MAY 18TH, 2026 WITH: Your name and contact information brief description Any relevant your case and judgement social media links'

🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM (NYFA STUDENT PROJECT)

We are casting for a short film created as part of a New York Film Academy student project.

Looking for:
Male actor, age range 40–50

Shoot dates:
June 24 – approximately 3–4 days of shooting

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – STUDENT SHORT FILM (LONDON, UNPAID)**

We’re casting for *“Jumpers for Goalposts,”* a coming-of-age short film at the London College of Communication.

**Logline:**
A London-set story exploring masculinity and body image within a local football team.

**SHOOT DATES:**
May 5th–12th (exact dates vary by role)

**LOCATION:** London (football ground + interior location)

ROLES:

**ROBBIE (Lead)**
Male, 17–23
A bench player struggling with body image and masculinity. Stocky build.
*White / European descent. Previous acting experience preferred.*

**CLIVE (Supporting)**
Male, 35–60
A local football coach. Informal, crass, blunt.
*Previous acting experience preferred.*

**MUM (Supporting)**
Female, 35–60
Robbie's mum. Caring and affectionate, close with Robbie.
*White / European descent. Previous acting experience preferred.*

**COLE (Supporting)**
Male, 17–23
The team’s best player. Confident, obnoxious, antagonistic toward Robbie.
*Previous acting experience preferred.*

**FOOTBALL PLAYERS (Extras)**
Male, 17–25
Background players on the team. No acting experience required.

TO APPLY:

Please send an email to jumpersforgoalpostsfilm@outlook.com with your name, headshot, CV, and any showreels if applicable.

*Meet THE MANDELAS*
A 90s-style comedy about a family, a girlfriend, and a secret that won't stay hidden. In a world of new beginnings, Thabo is looking for a way out, the Reverend is looking for the truth, and Lerato is just looking for a nice dinner.

Dinner is served. Confession is mandatory. 

We’re looking for: 
Young Male (20s)
Young Woman (20s)
Older Man (40+)

Able to speak Xhosa

Smashed it last night in ADULT BEGINNERS! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

Why not come and join us next time? This class is for anybody, even if you haven’t danced before!! With my guidance you’ll be amazed what you can do! (Details in the comments.) 

#liverpooldance #beginnersdance #liverpoolfitness #Liverpool #starttheweek

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL / Unpaid / Non-Union**

**Deadline:** May 9 (decisions made on a rolling basis, may close earlier)

Casting for 3 major roles and 2 minor roles for a historical romantic comedy short film, which will be showing at FEST New Directors and Films Festival in Portugal in late June. The film will be submitted to other festivals as opportunities arise.

All actors should be comfortable wearing period dress and delivering elevated / historical dialogue.

Shoot dates are TBD but will be during **mid to late May** in **Steveston, Richmond**. For major roles, in-person availability is also required in **early May** for **costume fittings**, which will be made custom to measurements.

# **Major Roles**

Helewise (lead) — Woman, Mid/Late 20's / European looking

Cozzo (romantic interest) — Man, Late 20's / Early 30's / European looking

Aniel — Man (or masculine presenting) / Open Age and Race 

# **Minor Roles**

Village girl (voice only) — 20's/30's. Youthful sounding. One day only.

Senior Banker — 40's-60's. One day only. Small monologue.

# **Contact:**

**For audition materials please email headshots and a full body slate (unlisted Youtube video preferred) to the following email:** helewiseshortfilm@gmail.com

**Subject line:**

[Your name] - [Role(s) you are auditioning for] - Talent

Example:

John Doe - Aniel, Cozzo - Talent

items.text:
🎭 Call for Artists: Join Chinese Culture Week 2026 at the Edinburgh Fringe! (You don’t need to be Chinese! 

🎭We are thrilled to announce that Chinese Culture Week (CCW) is partnering with C venues to bring the best of performance art to the 2026 Edinburgh Festival Fringe! 

We are looking for exceptional shows to join our curated program at the CCW Performance Main House.   

✨ Why Perform With Us?
Our venue is a full-scale black box theatre featuring professional raked seating and a generous stage area.  Whether your work is traditional, contemporary, or experimental, our space is designed to make it shine. 

We have a whole package of marketing to help you! 

Flexible Capacity: 
Standard end-on seating ranges from 115–235, with a thrust stage option for up to 296 audience members.   
Professional Flooring: A flat floor featuring black vinyl dancefloor over wood—perfect for movement-based work.   
Top-Tier Tech: Equipped with ETC Ion/Eos family lighting consoles and 30-way LED color-changing units.   
Accessibility: Fully level access from the street to both the audience and stage areas.   

🌟 Who are we looking for?
We welcome a diverse range of genres!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – STUDENT SHORT FILM (LONDON, UNPAID)**

We’re casting for *“Jumpers for Goalposts,”* a coming-of-age short film at the London College of Communication.

**Logline:**
A London-set story exploring masculinity and body image within a local football team.

**SHOOT DATES:**
May 5th–12th (exact dates vary by role)

**LOCATION:** London (football ground + interior location)

ROLES:

**ROBBIE (Lead)**
Male, 17–23
A bench player struggling with body image and masculinity. Stocky build.
*White / European descent. Previous acting experience preferred.*

**CLIVE (Supporting)**
Male, 35–60
A local football coach. Informal, crass, blunt.
*Previous acting experience preferred.*

**MUM (Supporting)**
Female, 35–60
Robbie's mum. Caring and affectionate, close with Robbie.
*White / European descent. Previous acting experience preferred.*

**COLE (Supporting)**
Male, 17–23
The team’s best player. Confident, obnoxious, antagonistic toward Robbie.
*Previous acting experience preferred.*

**FOOTBALL PLAYERS (Extras)**
Male, 17–25
Background players on the team. No acting experience required.

TO APPLY:

Please send an email to jumpersforgoalpostsfilm@outlook.com with your name, headshot, CV, and any showreels if applicable.

items.groupTitle: Casting For Artists&Dancers Travel All Over The World
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
केही महिना देखि नेपाली समकालीन कलाकार मुकेश श्रेष्ठको चित्रकला 'बोधिसत्व अफ पावर' (२०२३/२४)र बोधिसत्व बज्रपाणिसम्बन्धि  'ॐ बज्रपाणि हूँ' मन्त्र सङ्गीतलाई सँगसँगै हेर्ने र सुन्ने प्रयोग गरेँ । चित्रकला र मन्त्र सङ्गीत बीचमा गहिरो दार्शनिक र कलात्मक सम्बन्ध रहेको पाएँ । यी दुवै माध्यमले बुद्ध धर्मको शक्ति र दर्शनको पक्षलाई प्रदीप्त गरेको महसुस गरेँ ।

चित्रकला सन्दर्भ -
- कलाकार मुकेश श्रेष्ठले आफ्नो चित्रमा परम्परागत बौद्ध कला र आधुनिक शैलीको मिश्रण गरेका छन् ।
- चित्रमा बज्रपाणि बोधिसत्वको क्रोध मुद्रा र भाव देखाइएको देखिन्छ । 
- गाढा नीलो शरीर र हातमा रहेको बज्रले अज्ञानता र नकारात्मकतालाई नष्ट गर्ने अजेय शक्तिको प्रतिनिधित्व गर्ने प्रतीकात्मकवादी सिद्धान्तको प्रयोग गरेका छन ।
- पृष्ठभूमिमा रहेको रातो र सुन्तला रङको विष्फोटक मिश्रणले परिवर्तनको ज्वाला (प्रभामण्डल) लाई जनाउँछ। यो केवल विनाश होइन, बरु मोह र लोभलाई जलाएर ज्ञानको मार्ग प्रशस्त गर्ने ऊर्जा हो भन्ने बौद्ध दर्शनको मूल भाव देख्न सकिन्छ ।
- यो चित्रकलाको दार्शनिक पक्ष भनेको "अज्ञानताबाट ज्ञानतर्फको यात्रा" हो । यस चित्रले देखाउँछ कि बाहिरी रूप क्रोधित देखिए पनि यसको भित्री सार भनेको करुणा र सुरक्षा नै हो।

सन्दर्भ मन्त्र सङ्गीत -
- यो मन्त्र सङ्गीतले मानिसको भित्री चेतनालाई जागृत गराउने कार्य गर्दो रहेछ ।
- शाब्दिक रुपमा 'ॐ' ले ब्रह्माण्डीय ऊर्जा, 'बज्रपाणि' ले शक्तिको स्रोत र 'हूँ' ले त्यो शक्तिलाई आफ्नै भित्री अस्तित्वमा जागृत गराउने प्रक्रियालाई इङ्गित गर्ने रहेछ ।
- सङ्गीत दर्शन अनुसार, यो मन्त्रको निरन्तर जप वा श्रवणले शरीरमा एक प्रकारको ऊर्जा उत्पन्न गर्छ जसले मानसिक डरलाई शक्ति र आत्मविश्वासमा बदल्ने शक्ति प्रदान गर्ने रहेछ ।
- यो मन्त्र  सङ्गीतको ऊर्जावान् लयले साधकलाई बाधा-व्यवधान र नकारात्मक सोचबाट मुक्त गरी आध्यात्मिक शक्ति प्रदान गर्ने रहेछ ।
Ramesh Rai 
Muku Manan 
"बोधिसत्व अफ पावर"

items.text:
👗 **FITTING MODEL WANTED – Size 38** 👗
📍 Berlin-Charlottenburg

You’re a size 38 and curious what really happens behind the scenes of a fashion brand?
Join our fitting sessions and be part of how our collections come to life. 🙌✨

✨ **What you’ll do**
• Try on new styles together with our product team 👚
• Give honest feedback on fit, comfort & feel 💬
• Help us perfect our collections before launch 🎯
→ No shootings, no runway – just real product work 🚫📸

📏 **Your measurements (approx.)**
• Height: 168 cm (±4 cm)
• Bust: 88 cm (±2 cm)
• Waist: 73 cm (±2 cm)
• Hips: 98 cm (±2 cm)

🕒 **The setup**
• 2x per week, approx. 3h per session ⏰
• Monday–Friday (daytime) 📅
• Freelance, mini-job or working student 💼

📩 **How to apply**
Send an email to job@legerbylenagercke.com with:
1️⃣ Photos (front / side / back) in fitted top & leggings 📸
2️⃣ Your current measurements 📐
3️⃣ A few lines about yourself & your availability ✍️

🔗 [https://www.legerbylenagercke.com/pages/karriere](https://www.legerbylenagercke.com/pages/karriere)
items.previewDescription: LeGer by Lena Gercke is a Berlin-based fashion brand that empowers women through fashion and builds an inspiring and supportive community.

items.text:
Looking for 3 African American actresses for a primarily silent short film slated for June 20 -21. These roles are paid. Based in Los Angeles, CA

**Lead:**

*Mid 20's*

An African-American woman with a darker complexion is battling her mental health, worn down by the pressures of city life, adulthood, and past trauma. She retreats into the woods in an attempt to reconnect with herself and find clarity. Physically fit, she is capable of running and navigating the terrain. Actress must be comfortable being immersed in nature, including scenes involving dirt and mud.

**Young Aurora**

*Age 6-10*

Child actor. African-American. Happy, picture of innocence; the heart of the project wants for her older self's survival and tries to guide her to safety. Comfortable with running and in nature. Darker complexion.

**Older Aurora**

*45-55*

A tortured soul. The antagonist of the story is determined to end her younger self's life/suffering; comfortable in nature and running; comfortable with using a bow and arrow, but prior experience is not required. Also comfortable with brief tasteful nudity.

Please email the director your headshot, reel/work, and Instagram (if available): imanijngrant@gmail.com

[[www.everythingisplural.com](www.everythingisplural.com)](https://www.facebook.com/api/graphql/www.everythingisplural.com)

items.text:
I’m casting people in Georgia for a short cinematic YouTube project.

I’m looking for someone who is currently experiencing or reflecting on one of the following:

a dream or idea they haven’t started
a life transition or change
a creative block or reset
something personal they’ve been sitting with

Filming will take place within the next 1–2 weeks and will take about 1–2 hours total. Location will be local in Georgia and kept simple/comfortable.

This is an unpaid, passion-based creative project. Selected participants will receive a cinematic video feature, a copy of their final edited segment, and will be part of a storytelling series they can share once released (with permission).

No acting experience needed — just openness and comfort being on camera.
If you’re interested, please DM or email jcut22media@gmail.com 

You can also submit a short form here:

https://forms.gle/7W27ByJRQMp6iT3j9

items.text:
CASTING CALL – Energy Drink Spec! (OC/LA, Paid) 

Currently casting for (3) youthful, female leads for an energy drink spec for a growing production company. 

The shoot (non-union) will be in Los Angeles/Orange County, sometime in May, with a day rate of $50. Along with compensation, the actors will get some BTS & additional photos + videos for  their social media/reel/portfolio.  

ISO: 

(1) – Beach Runner: clean, natural, everyday, fit/athletic girl-next-door type of character, this position will require some light jogging/running 
(1) – Pilates/Yoga Practitioner: quiet confidence, natural vibe, fit/athletic, disciplined
(1) – Party Attendee: Free Spirited, extroverted, high energy, bright smile,bold-ish vibe, but still maintaining the clean, athletic/fit look, etc. 

* Each role will have different skills/requirements

If interested, please submit your: 
- Contact information
- Dates you’re available in May
- Headshot, full body shot, reel
- Resume
to riannamamitag.prod@gmail.com ! 

Please follow the subject line format of: First Last Name - Role(s) - Spec 

Looking forward to your submissions & connecting with you! Please submit your profile & related materials by 5/1 .

items.text:
Cześć, szukamy osób chętnych do wzięcia udziału w festiwalu 48 hfp w Krakowie. Całość jest realizowana NON-PROFIT.
Od aktorów do ekipy, chcielibyśmy, żeby aktorzy byli z Krakowa lub bliskich okolic co by ułatwiło logistykę ale nie jest to wymóg. 

Termin festiwalu: 29-31 maj, Kraków 

Aktorzy nie muszą być profesjonalistami i ludźmi siedzącymi w branży od 10 lat. 

Do ekipy szukamy jeszcze: 
Gaffera, w miarę możliwości z własnymi światłami, ale nie jest to wymagane.
Dźwiękowca, albo osoby, która szybko łapie sprzęt audio i da radę się tego nauczyć, jesteśmy w stanie zapewnić cały potrzebny sprzęt audio, od booma do rekordera. 
Focus Pullera, który byłby w miarę możliwości tez asystentem operatora, bycie asystentem nie jest wymagane. Tutaj, też w miarę możliwości ze swoim sprzętem do ostrzenia. 
Opcjonalnie jeżeli będą chętni to szukamy drugiego montażysty do zespołu żeby usprawnić pracę. 

Jeżeli jednak masz w swoim portfolio ciekawe materiały i chciałbyś spróbować czegoś nowego to też jesteśmy chętni podjąć rozmowy. 

Doświadczenie nie jest wymagane duże, byleby tylko znać się na tym co się robi i nie zepsuć nagrań. 

Wiem, ze czasami jest problem napisać do mnie wiadomość prywatną więc w takim przypadku piszcie w komentarzu albo na maila: 
tadeek.gryziecki@gmail.com

Gaffera, w miarę możliwości z własnymi światłami, ale nie jest to wymagane.
Dźwiękowca, albo osoby, która szybko łapie sprzęt audio i da radę się tego nauczyć, jesteśmy w stanie zapewnić cały potrzebny sprzęt audio, od booma do rekordera. 
Focus Pullera, który byłby w miarę możliwości tez asystentem operatora, bycie asystentem nie jest wymagane. Tutaj, też w miarę możliwości ze swoim sprzętem do ostrzenia. 
Opcjonalnie jeżeli będą chętni to szukamy drugiego montażysty do zespołu żeby usprawnić pracę. 

Jeżeli jednak masz w swoim portfolio ciekawe materiały i chciałbyś spróbować czegoś nowego to też jesteśmy chętni podjąć rozmowy. 

Doświadczenie nie jest wymagane duże, byleby tylko znać się na tym co się robi i nie zepsuć nagrań. 

Wiem, ze czasami jest problem napisać do mnie wiadomość prywatną więc w takim przypadku piszcie w komentarzu albo na maila: 
tadeek.gryziecki@gmail.com

items.title: Do majowego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie (oraz bliskich okolicach) szukam:

items.text:
Cześć jestem siedemnastoletnim biegaczem długodystansowym który zajmuje się montażem krótkich formatów od rolek po reklamy. Nie ukrywam że jest to początek mojej półprofesjonalnej przygody montażowej, lecz niech cię to nie zwiedzie - hobbystycznie montowałem już od jakiegoś czasu ale dopiero teraz zdecydowałem się tą pasje przekuć w coś więcej. Więc jeżeli zdecydujesz sie na współpracę ze mną napisz komentarz pod postem o treści “Wow” a to ja się do ciebie odezwę. Pamietaj również, że będzie to dla mnie duża pomoc w dalszym rozwoju montażowo-biegowym. Pozdrawiam twój przyszły montażysta. 

Portfolio:

[[https://www.instagram.com/reel/DXRQDFkEpcr/](https://www.instagram.com/reel/DXRQDFkEpcr/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHju8QmPSEqjEAwY9HZHEUuks9CDfIdFK_aWBZZmzp1J9Swvt8WPledoElOI7_aem_Y1d-4oABigV4zeh3JJsN9g)...]

items.text:
✨🎶 II INTERNATIONAL ART COMPETITION
„KLUCZ DO SUKCESU” 🔑🌟

Każdy sukces zaczyna się od jednego kroku… a może właśnie od Twojego talentu? 💫
Ten konkurs to nie tylko rywalizacja — to Twoja szansa, aby odnaleźć własny klucz do sukcesu 🔑 i otworzyć drzwi do nowych możliwości! 🚪

📅 Termin przyjmowania zgłoszeń: 26.04 – 10.05
💻 Uczestnictwo zdalne — twórz i pokazuj swój talent z dowolnego miejsca na świecie! 🌍

🎭 Dlaczego warto wziąć udział?
⭐ Bez ograniczeń wiekowych — każdy może zabłysnąć!
🎨 Wszystkie nominacje i gatunki — pokaż to, co kochasz najbardziej!
📜 Dyplomy i listy dziękczynne dla uczestników!
🏆 Medale i puchary.

🔴Unikalny koszt uczestnictwa: tylko 20 PLN🔴

❣️To Twój moment, aby uwierzyć w siebie i zrobić krok naprzód!
Nie czekaj na idealny moment — stwórz go sam 🎤🎨

🌐 Szczegóły i zgłoszenia:
2gagencja.com

items.text:
Weź udział w Festiwalu Piosenki Dziecięcej i Młodzieżowej Akcelerator Kultury!
To nic nie kosztuje! Masz talent? Wystarczy tylko kilka kroków i możesz zabłysnąć na scenie. Atrakcyjne nagrody czekają właśnie na Ciebie.🎤🫟🪐🌈

sharedPost.text:
Masz talent? Pokaż go na scenie!  🎤 Zobacz, jak prosto zapisać się na nasz konkurs!

Zauważyliśmy, że macie mnóstwo pytań dotyczących zgłoszeń na III Konkurs Piosenki Dziecięcej i Młodzieżowej, dlatego nasz animator przygotował dla Was krótką ściągę! 

W tym filmie przeprowadzimy Cię krok po kroku przez formularz zgłoszeniowy. Dowiesz się:
✅ Jakie dane są niezbędne,
✅ Gdzie wgrać demo,
✅ Jak poprawnie wysłać zgłoszenie, by mieć pewność, że do nas dotarło?

Nie zwlekaj – obejrzyj instrukcję i dołącz do grona uczestników! Czekamy na Wasze niesamowite głosy! 

Link do formularza: https://zzofullkba.cfolks.pl/
Termin zgłoszeń upływa: 30 kwietnia o godz. 20.00

Masz pytania? Pisz w komentarzu lub dzwoń – chętnie pomożemy!

items.summary: The industry of acting is a stressful way of life. I’ve wanted to quit so many times. But we learn, we grow, we become better, and we fix are mistakes. If you’re good at something never do it for free. Believe in yourself. Don’t let someone tell you who you are.
