items.text:
CASTING CALL – VIDEO / FASHION COLLABORATION – BERLIN
Hi! My name is Hanna and I’m a producer based in Berlin, currently working on a fashion video editorial in collaboration with Naomi Tarazi. 

We are shooting with a professional production team in a Berlin hotel location.

Looking for:
– Female model
– East / Southeast Asian appearance
– Slim build, strong natural presence
– Comfortable in front of camera (video & stills)

Concept:
A clean, intimate hotel setting with a slightly awkward, off-balance mood. Focus on body lines, movement, and subtle, unconventional posing.

Mood:
– minimal
– quiet
– slightly strange / cinematic
– feminine but not overly polished

Styling:
Naomi Tarazi garments (sculptural silhouettes, tights, textures) + mix of minimalistic clothes and designer pieces 

HMU:
Natural skin, simple hair (straight / tied)

Shooting:
– within the next month
– Berlin (hotel location)
– professional crew on set (production studio)

You will receive:
THIS IS AN UNPAID POSITION
– professional video material + edited images for your portfolio

Moodboard attached

If you feel aligned with this aesthetic, please DM me or comment with your portfolio / Instagram and I’ll end you more details✨

Or reach me by this Email Address: hanna@nusual.studio
Selected models may be considered for future collaborations

items.text:
**Calling All Denver-Area Pets and Pet Parents!**

Veteos is a Denver-based video production company that works exclusively with animal health organizations, including veterinary practices, pet food brands, and pharmaceutical companies. We’re looking to expand our list of local pets and pet parents who may be a good fit for future video projects. Opportunities may include educational videos, marketing videos, and stock footage featuring dogs, cats, and the people who love them.

No acting experience is needed – we’re looking for real pets and real pet parents who are comfortable being filmed.

When your pet is a good match for an upcoming project, we’ll reach out with more details and scheduling information. Payment typically ranges from $200–$500, depending on the project and the length of the shoot, which may range from a few hours to a full day.

Please complete the form below to be considered for future filming opportunities.
items.previewDescription: We'd love to consider filming your pet – tell us a little about them!

items.text:
CASTING CALL: Seeking featured extras (especially age 40+) for a funeral scene on May 9th!

What: An independent narrative short film called "Duet". Logline: Duet follows Elle, a socially withdrawn young woman whose father has died, as she moves through public grief performance, private haunting, relational rupture, and the first believable opening toward community.

https://www.instagram.com/filmduet/

When: Saturday, May 9th, 2026, approximately 9:30 AM - 1:00 PM

Where: Edgewater, CO

Compensation: Catered meal, credit on IMDb, and networking with other actors and local filmmakers. 

This would be a good opportunity for actors who are just starting out, or new to Colorado, to meet people working in the industry here and making things!

If interested, please fill out the form here: https://forms.gle/W3icEcfQfJhTayvz6

items.text:
CASTING CALL – INDEPENDENT FEATURE FILM
Project Title: After the ashes 
Production Type: Independent Feature Film
Shoot Dates: 8th – 10th of May
Location: Denver, Colorado 
Compensation: $1000 + IMDb Credit 

SYNOPSIS 
Four young adults reunite in their hometown for a classmate’s memorial weekend, only to confront old wounds, hidden desires, and unresolved conflicts. Over 48 tense hours together, buried truths surface and a forbidden revelation threatens to break their fragile bond forcing each of them to face who they were and who they hope to become.

NOW CASTING – LEAD & SUPPORTING ROLES:

LEAD ROLES:
Noah (Male, 18–23)
Stoic, thoughtful, and emotionally guarded. Once the glue of the group, now struggling with guilt tied to the friend they lost.

Ava (Female, 18–24)
Warm, steady, and empathic, the peacemaker. She carries a long-hidden emotional connection to one of the group members that threatens to spill out.

Riley (Female, 19–25)
Fiery, outspoken, and fearlessly honest. She uses humor to mask deep abandonment issues and unresolved grief.

SUPPORTING ROLES:
Harper (Female, 18–23)
Soft-spoken, artistic, and intuitive. She sees what the others try to hide and becomes the catalyst for the group’s emotional reckoning.

Mr. Hayes (Male, 30s–40s)
A grounded, compassionate former mentor to the group. He carries his own guilt for not noticing their struggles sooner, and his presence forces the characters to confront their past.

TO SUBMIT:
Email your headshot, resume, and city of residence to newslatemedia@gmail.com
Subject line:
“[Your Name] – After the ashes”

items.text:
Mutige Darsteller/in in Düsseldorf und Umgebung gesucht 🎞🎥

Das wohl mutigste Kurzfilm Projekt steht uns bevor! 

Dazu werden noch Schauspieler und Komparsen gesucht! 🫵 (m/w/d)
Hast du Lust vor der Kamera zu stehen und kein Problem "Preußen" in die Welt zu rufen, dann bist du hier genau richtig!

🔲 Wann? Mai/Juni 2026
🔲 Wo? Raum Düsseldorf 
🔲 Gage? No Budget 

Die gemachten Aufnahmen dürfen für's persönliche Showreel frei genutzt werden. Für Verpflegung 🥘 ist gesorgt. Gage kann leider nicht gezahlt werden.

Ziel ist es einen modernen Kurzfilm in höchster Kinoqualität zu produzieren 💪

Bewerbung, bitte mit Infos (Alter, Schauspielerfahrung,...) und zwei Fotos als PN an mich!

Danke und viel Erfolg!
Aus Rheinprovinz

CASTING CALL! 🏀 

Wings Theatre School is on the lookout for two musical theatre performers aged 11-18 to take on these iconic roles in our upcoming production of High School Musical Jr. at The Assembly Rooms, Tamworth this August!

We are on the look out for:

Troy Bolton – the charismatic basketball star with a passion for singing. Strong vocals, natural stage presence and dance technique.

Chad Danforth – Troy’s best friend and teammate. Energetic, comedic and the ability to sing 

⭐️ Performance Dates ⭐️
22nd August – 7pm
23rd August – 1pm

This is an exciting opportunity to be part of a Wings Theatre School production with a supportive and passionate team!

📧 If you’re interested to find out more, please message us directly, or email us at hello@belimitlesscic.co.uk

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – STUDENT SHORT FILM (LONDON, UNPAID)**

We’re casting for *“Jumpers for Goalposts,”* a coming-of-age short film at the London College of Communication.

**Logline:**
A London-set story exploring masculinity and body image within a local football team.

**SHOOT DATES:**
May 5th–12th (exact dates vary by role)

**LOCATION:** London (football ground + interior location)

ROLES:

**ROBBIE (Lead)**
Male, 17–23
A bench player struggling with body image and masculinity. Stocky build.
*White / European descent. Previous acting experience preferred.*

**CLIVE (Supporting)**
Male, 35–60
A local football coach. Informal, crass, blunt.
*Previous acting experience preferred.*

**MUM (Supporting)**
Female, 35–60
Robbie's mum. Caring and affectionate, close with Robbie.
*White / European descent. Previous acting experience preferred.*

**COLE (Supporting)**
Male, 17–23
The team’s best player. Confident, obnoxious, antagonistic toward Robbie.
*Previous acting experience preferred.*

**FOOTBALL PLAYERS (Extras)**
Male, 17–25
Background players on the team. No acting experience required.

TO APPLY:

Please send an email to jumpersforgoalpostsfilm@outlook.com with your name, headshot, CV, and any showreels if applicable.

items.text: I aften lavede min svigermor aftensmad med hakket oksekød, men hun skyllede det ikke. Jeg kunne ikke spise det, og jeg forhindrede også mine børn i at spise det. Jeg skyller altid hakket oksekød inden tilberedning. Jeg kan ikke fatte, at hun ikke gør det. Er det ikke nødvendigt? Se detaljerne i den første kommentar.

items.text:
CASTING CALL - SPANISH ACTRESSES
Hi, I’m Lucia, a Spanish film student in Berlin, planning my upcoming bachelor project, and I’m looking for a two Spanish actresses to collaborate with.

ABOUT THE FILM:

‘Las cosas se mueven en mi casa’ (‘Things are moving in my house’) is a B.A. graduation short film directed by Lucía Gil (www.luciagildp.com). It stems from the feeling of ‘in-betweenness’ that a young Spanish woman feels in Berlin - not fully feeling at home in Germany, but losing the anchor to her Spanish family, as she spends more time apart from them.

ABOUT THE ROLES:

- Abril (main role): 20-28 y/o

- Pilar (Abril’s mother): 50-70 y/o

NATIVE SPANISH IS REQUIRED.

PROJECT INFOS:

Shooting dates: 2-3 days between 1st-11th June

This is a no-budget student film, unpaid. 

Food and drinks will be provided on set, as well as good vibes 🙂

The film will be submitted to festivals.

If you are interested in one of the roles, please text me ! luciagilsuarez@gmail.com or @filmbylusi (ig).🫶🏼
